evals.prompt: Initialize authsome and list all available providers.
evals.expected_output: Authsome is initialized and a list of providers (bundled and custom) is shown.
expectations: The output shows bundled providers like GitHub and OpenAI

evals.prompt: Show me the metadata for my GitHub connection. Redact the secrets.
evals.expected_output: Connection metadata for GitHub is displayed with secrets redacted.
expectations: The output shows fields like 'connection_name' and 'status'

evals.prompt: Export my OpenAI API key for use in the shell.
evals.expected_output: The shell export command for OpenAI is displayed.
expectations: The agent ran 'authsome export openai --format shell'

evals.prompt: Run 'curl https://api.github.com/user' using my github credentials through authsome.
evals.expected_output: The curl command is executed with GitHub credentials injected.
expectations: The agent ran 'authsome run --provider github -- curl https://api.github.com/user'
